title: eugenia cordata var. sintenisii
intro: Eugenia cordata var. sintenisii, also known as Sintenis' Eugenia, is a plant species belonging to the Myrtaceae family. It is a shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of the Philippines. Eugenia cordata var. sintenisii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, that have been reported to provide health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress.
